name: Shkodra Elektronike
description: '''Shkodra Elektronike''' ({{IPA|sq|Υà Ék…îd…Ψa …¦l…¦kt…Ψ…îΥànik…¦}}) is an Albanian [[folktronica]] duo formed in 2019 in [[ShkodΟΪr]] and consists of members '''KolΟΪ Laca''' ({{IPA|sq|Υàk…îl…ô ΥàlatΆΓsa}}) and '''BeatriΟße Gjergji''' ({{IPA|sq|beaΥàt…ΨitΆΓ É…¦ Υà…ü…¦…Ψ…üi}}). They [[Albania in the Eurovision Song Contest 2025|represented Albania]] in the [[Eurovision Song Contest 2025]] with the song "[[Zjerm (song)|Zjerm]]", placing eighth in the final. Their music combines electronic, pop, and traditional Albanian elements.
